The Face of Criticism around Idols
← BACK
Seminar Note CRITICISM 2026.04.01

The Face of Criticism around Idols

A short note on the face that criticism puts on when it speaks about idols.

Criticism often presents itself as neutral analysis, but in practice it carries a moral posture and an implicit hierarchy of taste.

This text follows that posture and its rhetoric.
